scripts.test:device-links: tsc --target es2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir ../../../output/codenames-device-links ./src/runtime/shared/codenames-runtime.ts && node ./src/runtime/shared/codenames-device-links.check.cjs ../../../output/codenames-device-links/codenames-runtime.js
scripts.test:captain-pairing: tsc --target es2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir ../../../output/codenames-captain-pairing ./src/setup/components/captain-pairing-modal-state.ts && node ./src/setup/components/captain-pairing-modal-state.check.cjs ../../../output/codenames-captain-pairing/captain-pairing-modal-state.js
